title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 28 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF SARANGANI IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION DAY

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, April 01, 2025 p.8

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12142, March 27, 2025 ]

AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 28 OF EVERY YEAR A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF SARANGANI IN COMMEMORATION OF ITS FOUNDATION DAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. November 28 of every year is hereby declared a special non-working holiday in the Province of Sarangani in commemoration of its foundation anniversary.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on November 21, 2022 and December 17, 2024, respectively.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: MAR 27 2025

(

SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
